title: Fokas-type closed-form solution formulae for Sobolev-type equations with time-dependent coefficients
summary: We analytically derive novel explicit integral representations for the solution of nonhomogeneous initial-boundary-value problems for a large category of evolution partial differential equations of Sobolev-Galpern type with generic temporally variable coefficients, satisfying suitable mild conditions, and with arbitrary data in classical function spaces. This work is based on the careful implementation of the pioneering Fokas unified transform methodology alongside its recently-proposed extension for solving a class of linear evolution equations with dispersion relation of specific polynomial type and time-dependent coefficients. We herein effectively extend those techniques to a special collection of evolution equations with time-dependent coefficients and mixed spatiotemporal derivatives, which induce rational dispersion relations. The new approach is exhibited in detail through illustrative generation of closed-form solutions for a multitude of such equations (such as Milne-Taylor-Barenblatt-Coleman-Ting-Chen-type, Benjamin-Bona-Mahony-type, as well as numerous higher-order variants) posed on the half-line. Challenging technical difficulties of complex-analytic and of algebraic flavour naturally emerge due the presence of mixed-derivative terms, and these are appropriately resolved in each case. The new formulas are of utility in subsequent investigation of qualitative properties and analysis of nonlinear counterparts too. Further extensions, generalizations, rigorous aspects and implementations to other types of problems as well will soon be reported in forthcoming publications.

AI.tldr: 该论文为具有时间依赖系数的Sobolev-Galpern型演化偏微分方程建立了新的显式积分表示解公式。
AI.motivation: 研究具有时间依赖系数的Sobolev-Galpern型演化偏微分方程的非齐次初边值问题，这类方程包含混合时空导数项，导致有理色散关系，传统方法难以处理。
AI.techniques: 基于Fokas统一变换方法及其对具有特定多项式色散关系和时间依赖系数的线性演化方程的扩展，将技术推广到具有有理色散关系的混合导数方程。
AI.main_theorems: 为一大类具有时间依赖系数的Sobolev-Galpern型演化方程建立了新的显式积分表示解公式，适用于半直线上的初边值问题，涵盖Milne-Taylor-Barenblatt-Coleman-Ting-Chen型、Benjamin-Bona-Mahony型及其高阶变体。
AI.significance: 为具有混合时空导数和时间依赖系数的复杂演化方程提供了系统的解析求解框架，克服了复分析和代数方面的技术困难，为后续非线性问题研究和定性分析提供了基础。

title: Fundamental Properties and Embedding Results in a Novel $(Φ_x, ψ)$-Fractional Musielak Space with an Application to Nonlocal BVP
summary: In this paper, we introduce and study a novel class of generalized $(Φ_x,ψ)$-fractional Musielak spaces $\mathcal{K}_{Φ_x}^{α, β, ψ}$, which extends classical fractional spaces and offers the flexibility to model heterogeneous and nonlinear phenomena with memory and nonlocal effects. A detailed and rigorous analysis of their functional structure is carried out. Several new properties and embedding results are established, highlighting the originality of the proposed framework and its relevance to nonlocal BVPs. To illustrate the significance of this functional setting, we prove the existence of nontrivial solutions to a nonlinear fractional differential problem under an Ambrosetti--Rabinowitz type condition, using the mountain pass theorem. Our results provide new perspectives for the analysis of nonlocal and nonhomogeneous equations in variable-exponent and Musielak-Orlicz settings.

AI.tldr: 提出并研究了一类新的广义$(Φ_x,ψ)$-分数Musielak空间，建立了其函数结构、性质和嵌入结果，并应用于非线性分数微分方程解的存在性证明。
AI.motivation: 研究动机源于需要建立更灵活的数学框架来建模具有记忆和非局部效应的异质非线性现象，特别是针对变指数和Musielak-Orlicz环境下的非局部边值问题。
AI.techniques: 主要技术包括：广义分数空间构造、Musielak-Orlicz空间理论、函数嵌入分析、山路定理（mountain pass theorem）、Ambrosetti-Rabinowitz型条件应用。
AI.main_theorems: 1. 建立了广义$(Φ_x,ψ)$-分数Musielak空间$\mathcal{K}_{Φ_x}^{α, β, ψ}$的严格函数结构分析；2. 证明了该空间的新性质和嵌入结果；3. 在Ambrosetti-Rabinowitz型条件下，证明了非线性分数微分问题非平凡解的存在性。
AI.significance: 为变指数和Musielak-Orlicz环境下的非局部非齐次方程分析提供了新视角，扩展了经典分数空间理论，增强了建模异质非线性现象的能力。

title: A Fourier analysis for $(θ,T)$-periodic functions and applications
summary: We develop a Fourier analysis for a generalization of the class of periodic functions, often referred to as $(θ, T)$-periodic functions, and prove several properties and inequalities related to the Fourier transform, including a type of Poincaré inequality, which extend the periodic case. As an application, we employ this analysis to show that a continuous linear operator acting on smooth $(θ, T)$-periodic functions is globally hypoelliptic/solvable if and only if the corresponding operator which acts on periodic functions is globally hypoelliptic/solvable, and characterize the global hypoellipticity/solvability of a class of first order differential operators acting on the set of smooth $(θ, T)$-periodic functions.

AI.tldr: 建立了(θ,T)-周期函数的傅里叶分析框架，并应用于研究此类函数上微分算子的全局超椭圆性和可解性
AI.motivation: 研究广义周期函数（(θ,T)-周期函数）的傅里叶分析理论，这类函数推广了经典周期函数，需要建立相应的分析工具来研究其上的微分算子性质
AI.techniques: 傅里叶分析、泛函分析、微分算子理论、Poincaré不等式、全局超椭圆性和可解性分析
AI.main_theorems: 1. 建立了(θ,T)-周期函数的傅里叶分析框架及相关不等式；2. 证明了连续线性算子在(θ,T)-周期函数上全局超椭圆/可解当且仅当在经典周期函数上具有相同性质；3. 刻画了一阶微分算子在(θ,T)-周期函数上的全局超椭圆性和可解性
AI.significance: 扩展了周期函数理论，为研究广义周期结构上的微分方程提供了分析工具，连接了经典周期函数与广义周期函数的算子理论

title: A Poisson Formula for the Wave Propagator on Schwarzschild-de Sitter Backgrounds
summary: This paper proposes a Poisson formula for the wave propagator of the Schwarzschild--de Sitter (SdS) metric. That is done by proving a Poisson formula relating wave propagators and scattering resonances for a class of non-compactly supported potentials on the real line. That class includes the Regge--Wheeler potentials obtained from separation of variables for SdS. The novelty lies in allowing non-compact supports -- all exact Poisson formulae of Lax--Phillips, Melrose, and other authors required compactness of the support of the perturbation.

AI.tldr: 提出了Schwarzschild-de Sitter度规波传播子的泊松公式，突破了传统泊松公式要求势能紧支撑的限制
AI.motivation: 研究Schwarzschild-de Sitter度规（SdS）的波传播问题，传统泊松公式要求势能紧支撑，但SdS的Regge-Wheeler势能是非紧支撑的，需要发展新的数学工具
AI.techniques: 发展了非紧支撑势能的泊松公式理论，将Lax-Phillips和Melrose等人的紧支撑结果推广到非紧情形，特别处理了从SdS度规分离变量得到的Regge-Wheeler势能
AI.main_theorems: 证明了实线上非紧支撑势能类的波传播子与散射共振之间的泊松公式，该公式适用于SdS度规的Regge-Wheeler势能
AI.significance: 突破了传统散射理论中紧支撑限制，为研究黑洞和宇宙学背景下的波传播提供了新工具，对广义相对论和数学物理有重要理论意义

title: Low Regularity Well-Posedness of Cauchy Problem for Two-Dimensional Relativistic Euler Equation
summary:
In this article, we initiate the study of the Cauchy problem for the two-dimensional relativistic Euler equations in a low-regularity setting. By introducing good variables--a rescaled velocity, logarithmic enthalpy, and an appropriately defined vorticity, we reformulate the equations into a coupled wave-transport system.
  First, we prove the existence and uniqueness of solutions when the initial logarithmic enthalpy $h_0$, rescaled velocity $\bv_0$, and vorticity $\bw_0$ satisfy $(h_0, \bv_0, \bw_0, \nabla \bw_0) \in H^{\frac{7}{4}+}(\mathbb{R}^2) \times H^{\frac{7}{4}+}(\mathbb{R}^2) \times H^{\frac32+}(\mathbb{R}^2) \times L^8(\mathbb{R}^2)$. By using Strichartz estimates and semiclassical analysis, a relaxed well-posedness result holds when $(h_0, \bv_0, \bw_0, \nabla \bw_0) \in H^{\frac{7}{4}+}(\mathbb{R}^2) \times H^{\frac{7}{4}+}(\mathbb{R}^2) \times H^{\frac32}(\mathbb{R}^2) \times L^8(\mathbb{R}^2)$. Both results are valid for the general state function $p(\varrho)=\varrho^A$ ($A \geq 1$).
  Secondly, in the special case where $p(\varrho)=\varrho$, the acoustic metric reduces to the standard flat Minkowski metric. We can establish the well-posedness of solutions when $(h_0, \mathbf{v}_0, \mathbf{w}_0) \in H^{\frac{7}{4}+}(\mathbb{R}^2) \times H^{\frac{7}{4}+}(\mathbb{R}^2) \times H^{1+}(\mathbb{R}^2)$. The regularity exponents for the log-enthalpy and rescaled velocity correspond to those in Smith and Tataru \cite{ST}, while the vorticity regularity corresponds to Bourgain and Li \cite{BL}. Moreover, if the stiff flow is irrotational, we can prove the local well-posedness for $(h_0, \mathbf{v}_0) \in H^{1+}(\mathbb{R}^2)$, and global well-posedness for small initial data $(h_0, \bv_0) \in \dot{B}^{1}_{2,1}(\mathbb{R}^2)$.

AI.tldr: 首次研究二维相对论欧拉方程在低正则性下的柯西问题，通过变量变换得到波-输运耦合系统，建立了多个适定性结果。
AI.motivation: 研究二维相对论欧拉方程的柯西问题，特别是在低正则性条件下的适定性。相对论欧拉方程描述相对论流体动力学，其数学分析具有挑战性，特别是在低正则性条件下。
AI.techniques: 引入新的变量（重标度速度、对数焓、适当定义的涡量），将方程重构为波-输运耦合系统；使用Strichartz估计和半经典分析；利用声学度规的特殊结构。
AI.main_theorems: 1. 一般状态函数p(ρ)=ρ^A(A≥1)时，初始数据满足特定Sobolev空间条件下的存在唯一性；2. 线性状态p(ρ)=ρ时，声学度规退化为Minkowski度规，得到更优的适定性结果；3. 无旋流情形下，得到局部适定性和小初值全局适定性。
AI.significance: 这是首次系统研究二维相对论欧拉方程的低正则性适定性问题，建立了与经典欧拉方程类似的正则性要求，连接了相对论流体动力学与波动方程理论，为后续研究奠定了基础。

title: Global weak solutions of 3D compressible magnetohydrodynamic equations subject to large external potential forces with discontinuous initial data and vacuum
summary: We investigate the compressible magnetohydrodynamic equations subject to large external potential forces with discontinuous initial data in a three-dimensional bounded domain under Navier-slip boundary conditions. We show the global existence of weak solutions for such an initial-boundary value problem provided the initial energy is suitably small. In particular, the initial data may contain vacuum states and possibly exhibit large oscillations. To overcome difficulties brought by boundary and large external forces, some new estimates based on the effective viscous flux play crucial roles.

AI.tldr: 证明了在三维有界区域中，具有大外力、不连续初值和真空状态的磁流体动力学方程弱解的全局存在性
AI.motivation: 研究三维有界区域中可压缩磁流体动力学方程在Navier-slip边界条件下，面对大外力、不连续初值（可能包含真空状态和大振荡）时的全局解存在性问题
AI.techniques: 基于有效粘性通量的新估计方法，处理边界和大外力带来的困难，克服初值不连续性和真空状态的挑战
AI.main_theorems: 在初始能量充分小的条件下，证明了具有大外力、不连续初值（可能包含真空）的磁流体动力学方程弱解的全局存在性
AI.significance: 扩展了可压缩磁流体动力学理论，处理了更实际的物理情形（大外力、真空、不连续初值），为相关物理和工程应用提供了数学基础

title: Well-Posedness for Low Regularity Solutions to the g-SQG Equation with Regular Level Sets
summary: We show that the generalized SQG equation on the plane is locally well-posed in spaces of low regularity solutions (essentially Hölder continuous with Hölder exponents depending on the equation parameter $α\in(0,\frac 12)$) that have $H^2$ level sets (i.e., with $L^2$ curvatures). Moreover, for $α\le\frac 16$ and initial data satisfying some additional hypotheses we show that the corresponding solutions can stop existing only when their level sets lose $H^2$-regularity, and hence not just due to level set collisions or "pile ups".

AI.tldr: 证明了广义SQG方程在低正则性空间中的局部适定性，并建立了当α≤1/6时解的爆破准则与水平集的H^2正则性损失相关。
AI.motivation: 研究广义SQG（表面准地转）方程在平面上的适定性问题，特别是关注低正则性解空间（本质上是Hölder连续解）的局部存在性，并探讨解的爆破机制与水平集几何性质的关系。
AI.techniques: 使用Hölder空间理论、水平集几何分析、H^2正则性方法，以及针对广义SQG方程参数α的依赖分析，特别是对α≤1/6情况的特殊处理。
AI.main_theorems: 1. 广义SQG方程在具有H^2水平集（即L^2曲率）的低正则性Hölder连续解空间中局部适定；2. 当α≤1/6时，满足额外假设的初值对应的解仅在水平集失去H^2正则性时才会爆破，而不是由于水平集碰撞或"堆积"。
AI.significance: 为广义SQG方程建立了新的适定性理论框架，揭示了解的爆破机制与水平集几何正则性的深刻联系，对理解这类非线性发展方程的奇性形成有重要意义。

title: On the existence of full dimensional KAM tori for 1D periodic nonlinear Schrödinger equation
summary: In this paper, we will prove the existence of full dimensional tori for 1-dimensional nonlinear Schrödinger equation \begin{eqnarray}\label{maineq0} \mathbf{i}u_{t}-u_{xx}+V*u+εf(x)|u|^{4}u=0,\ x\in\mathbb{T}=\mathbb{R}/2π\mathbb{Z}, \end{eqnarray} with boundary conditions, where $V*$ is the Fourier multiplier, and $f(x)$ is Gevrey smooth. Here the radius of the invariant tori satisfies a slower decay, i.e. \[ I_n\sim e^{-2\ln^σ|n|}, \mbox{as}\ n\rightarrow\infty, \] for any $ σ> 2, $ which extends results of Bourgain \cite{BJFA2005} and Cong \cite{cong2024} to the case that the nonlinear perturbation depends explicitly on the space variable $x$.

AI.tldr: 证明了带空间依赖非线性项的一维非线性薛定谔方程存在全维KAM环面，将Bourgain和Cong的结果推广到非线性项显含空间变量的情形
AI.motivation: 研究一维非线性薛定谔方程在非线性项显含空间变量时的KAM理论，扩展Bourgain(2005)和Cong(2024)的结果到更一般的非线性扰动情形
AI.techniques: KAM理论、Gevrey光滑性分析、傅里叶乘子方法、不变环面构造、慢衰减半径估计
AI.main_theorems: 证明了方程存在全维不变环面，其半径满足慢衰减条件：I_n ∼ e^{-2ln^σ|n|} (σ>2)，推广了Bourgain和Cong的结果到非线性项显含空间变量的情形
AI.significance: 扩展了非线性薛定谔方程的KAM理论，处理了更一般的非线性扰动，为研究空间依赖非线性项的无穷维哈密顿系统提供了理论工具

title: Low-Mach-number limit for multiphase flows
summary: This paper is devoted to the study of the low-Mach-number limit for solutions of the compressible Navier-Stokes or Euler equations for different types of fluids. We first review the different results obtained in the case of flows consisting of one phase. Then, we focus on the low-Mach-number limit for two-phase flows, considering different types of systems: with an algebraic closure or a PDE closure for the pressure, with one single or two different velocities, without or with entropy.

AI.tldr: 该论文系统研究了单相和两相流体在低马赫数极限下可压缩Navier-Stokes或Euler方程解的渐近行为
AI.motivation: 研究可压缩流体在低马赫数极限下的渐近行为，这是流体力学中的经典问题，对于理解低速可压缩流动与不可压缩流动的过渡具有重要意义，特别关注两相流系统的复杂性
AI.techniques: 渐近分析、奇异摄动理论、多尺度展开、能量估计、低马赫数极限分析、两相流系统分析
AI.main_theorems: 系统回顾和总结了单相流低马赫数极限的已有结果，重点分析了两相流系统的低马赫数极限，包括代数封闭和PDE封闭的压力系统、单速度和双速度模型、有无熵方程的不同情况
AI.significance: 为两相流系统的低马赫数极限提供了系统的理论框架，对理解多相流在低速条件下的渐近行为有重要理论价值，为相关数值模拟和工程应用提供数学基础

title: Nekhoroshev type stability for non-local semilinear Schrödinger equations
summary: This paper investigates Nekhoroshev-type stability for solutions of ultra-differentiable regularity in Schrödinger equations with non-local nonlinear terms, employing the method of rational normal forms. We establish the first rigorous results for logarithmic ultra-differentiable regularity in infinite-dimensional Hamiltonian systems without external parameters. Under Gevrey class regularity assumptions, we achieve the stability times matching Bourgain's conjectured optimal stability time in \cite{B04}. Furthermore, we introduce a novel global vector field norm adapted to the rational normal form framework. This norm eliminate the need for degree tracking during the iteration process, thereby enabling a unified treatment of nonlinear terms.

AI.tldr: 建立了无外部参数无限维哈密顿系统中超可微正则解（特别是对数型超可微正则性）的Nekhoroshev型稳定性理论
AI.motivation: 研究具有非局部非线性项的薛定谔方程中超可微正则解的长时间稳定性问题，填补无限维哈密顿系统中对数型超可微正则性稳定性理论的空白
AI.techniques: 采用有理正规形式方法，引入适应有理正规形式框架的全局向量场范数，避免了迭代过程中的次数追踪，统一处理非线性项
AI.main_theorems: 1. 在无外部参数无限维哈密顿系统中首次建立了对数型超可微正则性的严格稳定性结果；2. 在Gevrey类正则性假设下，达到了Bourgain猜想的最优稳定性时间；3. 提出了新的全局向量场范数
AI.significance: 为无限维哈密顿系统的长时间稳定性理论提供了新工具，统一了非线性项的处理方法，验证了Bourgain关于最优稳定性时间的猜想

title: A unified proof of sharp bounds for the Jacobi heat kernel with trace and estimates of multiplicative constants
summary: We give a unified and optimized proof of the sharp bounds for the Jacobi heat kernel, which were obtained gradually in several papers in recent years. We lay particular emphasis on tracing and estimating all constants appearing throughout the entire reasoning. This allows us to quantitatively control the multiplicative constants in the Jacobi heat kernel bounds in terms of the parameters involved. Consequently, analogous control extends to a number of interrelated heat kernels. In particular, we obtain quantitative control in terms of the associated dimension for the spherical heat kernel and for all other heat kernels on compact rank one symmetric spaces.

AI.tldr: 对雅可比热核尖锐界给出统一优化证明，并定量控制所有常数依赖关系
AI.motivation: 近年来多个论文逐步获得了雅可比热核的尖锐界，但缺乏统一证明和常数定量控制，需要系统化处理
AI.techniques: 统一优化证明方法，常数追踪与估计技术，参数依赖定量分析，热核界推导
AI.main_theorems: 雅可比热核尖锐界的统一证明，所有常数定量控制，球形热核和紧秩一对称空间热核的维度依赖控制
AI.significance: 为热核分析提供系统化工具，使常数依赖关系显式化，扩展应用到紧秩一对称空间热核的定量控制

title: Bifurcating domains for an overdetermined eigenvalue problem in cylinders
summary: We study an overdetermined eigenvalue problem for domains $Ω$ contained in the half-cylinder $Σ=ω\times (0, +\infty)$, based on a bounded regular domain $ω\subset \mathbb{R}^{N-1}$. It is easy to see that in any bounded cylinder $Ω_{t}=ω\times (0, t)$, $t > 0$, the eigenvalue problem admits a one-dimensional positive eigenfunction which satisfies the overdetermined boundary conditions. The aim of the paper is to construct other domains $Ω\subset Σ$ for which there exists a positive eigenfunction that is a solution of the overdetermined problem. This is achieved by showing that branches of such domains bifurcate from the ``trivial'' domains $Ω_{t_j}$ at the values $t_{j} = \fracπ{2\sqrt{σ_j}}$ where $σ_j$ ($j\geq 1$) is a simple Neumann eigenvalue of the Laplace operator on $ω\subset \mathbb{R}^{N-1}$. The solutions can be reflected with respect to $ω$ to generate nontrivial solutions in a cylinder.

AI.tldr: 该论文通过分歧理论构造了半柱体中满足超定边界条件的特征值问题的新解域
AI.motivation: 研究半柱体Σ=ω×(0,+∞)中超定特征值问题的非平凡解域，其中ω是ℝ^{N-1}中的有界正则区域。已知在有限柱体Ω_t=ω×(0,t)中存在一维正特征函数满足超定边界条件，但需要寻找其他类型的解域。
AI.techniques: 使用分歧理论（bifurcation theory），从平凡解域Ω_{t_j}在特定参数值t_j处产生分歧分支，其中t_j与ω上Laplace算子的Neumann特征值σ_j相关
AI.main_theorems: 证明了在t_j = π/(2√σ_j)处（σ_j是ω上Laplace算子的简单Neumann特征值），从平凡解域Ω_{t_j}分歧出新的解域分支，这些解域通过关于ω的反射可以生成柱体中的非平凡解
AI.significance: 为超定特征值问题提供了新的解域构造方法，扩展了此类问题的解空间，展示了分歧理论在几何PDE问题中的应用价值

title: Nekhoroshev type stability for Ultra-differential Hamiltonian in $L^2$ space
summary: This paper combines the decay of high modes with the smallness introduced by high orders, leading to a normal form lemma for infinite-dimensional Hamiltonian systems under ultra-differentiable regularity. We prove the sub-exponential stability time of a wide class of Hamiltonian PDEs, including the Schrödinger equation with convolution potentials, fractional-order Schrödinger equations, and beam equations with metrics. When the conditions are equivalent to previous ones, the stability time we obtain reaches Bourgain's predicted optimal bound. Furthermore, we approach earlier results under lower conditions. These results are discussed within a general framework we propose, which applies to the ultra-differential class.

AI.tldr: 建立了无限维Hamilton系统在超可微正则性下的正规形引理，获得了Schrödinger方程、分数阶Schrödinger方程和梁方程等Hamilton PDE的亚指数稳定性时间
AI.motivation: 研究无限维Hamilton系统的长时间稳定性问题，特别是Hamilton PDE在超可微正则性下的稳定性时间估计，旨在达到Bourgain预测的最优界
AI.techniques: 结合高模衰减和高阶小性，建立无限维Hamilton系统的正规形引理；采用超可微函数类框架；利用正规形约化和Birkhoff正规形方法
AI.main_theorems: 1. 超可微正则性下无限维Hamilton系统的正规形引理；2. Schrödinger方程、分数阶Schrödinger方程和梁方程等Hamilton PDE的亚指数稳定性时间估计；3. 在等价条件下达到Bourgain预测的最优稳定性时间界
AI.significance: 为Hamilton PDE的长时间稳定性研究提供了新的理论框架，将结果推广到超可微函数类；在最优条件下达到理论预测的最优界；在较弱条件下改进了已有结果

title: Quantitative stratification and optimal regularity for harmonic almost complex structures
summary: In a recent interesting work [15], W.Y. He established the important partial regularity theory and the almost optimal higher regularity theory for energy minimizing harmonic almost complex structures. Based on a new observation on the structure of equations, we give an easier new proof of the partial regularity theorem, and adapting the powerful quantitative stratification method of Naber-Valtorta [22], we further prove the rectifiability of singular stratum of energy minimizing harmonic almost complex structures. Based on this, we establish an optimal regularity theory, which improves the corresponding result of He.

AI.tldr: 对能量极小化调和近复结构给出了更简单的部分正则性证明，并建立了奇异层的可整流性，从而改进了最优正则性理论
AI.motivation: He在[15]中建立了能量极小化调和近复结构的部分正则性理论和几乎最优的高阶正则性理论。本文旨在基于方程结构的新观察，给出更简单的证明，并进一步研究奇异层的性质
AI.techniques: 1. 对调和近复结构方程结构的新观察；2. Naber-Valtorta的定量分层方法；3. 奇异层的可整流性分析；4. 部分正则性理论的简化证明
AI.main_theorems: 1. 能量极小化调和近复结构部分正则性定理的更简单证明；2. 奇异层的可整流性结果；3. 改进的最优正则性理论，超越了He的相应结果
AI.significance: 1. 为调和近复结构的正则性理论提供了更简洁的证明框架；2. 首次建立了奇异层的可整流性，深化了对奇点结构的理解；3. 获得了最优的正则性结果，推动了该领域的发展

title: Homogenization of a micropolar fluid past a porous media with non-zero spin boundary condition
summary: We consider a micropolar fluid flow in a media perforated by periodically distributed obstacles of size $\varepsilon$. A non-homogeneous boundary condition for microrotation is considered: the microrotation is assumed to be proportional to the rotation rate of the velocity on the boundary of the obstacles. The existence and uniqueness of solution is analyzed. Moreover, passing to the limit when $\varepsilon$ tends to zero, an analogue of the classical micropolar Darcy law in the theory of porous media is derived.

AI.tldr: 建立了具有非齐次边界条件的微极性流体在周期性多孔介质中的Darcy定律
AI.motivation: 研究微极性流体在周期性多孔介质中的流动问题，考虑微旋转与速度旋转率成比例的非齐次边界条件，旨在建立多孔介质中的微极性Darcy定律
AI.techniques: 周期性均匀化方法、变分分析、存在唯一性证明、ε→0极限过程、多尺度展开
AI.main_theorems: 1. 解的存在唯一性定理；2. 当ε→0时的极限定理，推导出微极性Darcy定律形式的有效方程
AI.significance: 将经典Darcy定律推广到微极性流体，为多孔介质中微极性流体流动提供了理论基础，在生物流体力学、复杂流体输运等领域有应用价值

title: Uniform vanishing damping limit for the 2D inviscid Oldroyd-B model with fractional stress tensor diffusion
summary: This paper is devoted to the uniform vanishing damping limit of the 2D inviscid Oldroyd-B model with fractional stress tensor diffusion. Firstly, we find that fractional stress tensor diffusion helps to reduce the global regularity of the 2D Oldroyd-B model with damping coefficient $a\in[0,1]$. By virtue of improved Fourier splitting method, we then prove the optimal time decay rates under the critical regularity for $a=0$. When $a\in (0,1]$, we establish time decay rates that are uniform with respect to $a$. Combining the time decay rate for $a\in [0,1]$ and the time integrability, we obtain the uniform damping vanishing rates for the 2D Oldroyd-B model. Using spectral analysis methods, we finally improve the time decay rates for $\mathrm{tr}τ$ with $a\in (0,1]$, which ensure the sharp uniform damping vanishing rates of $\mathrm{tr}τ$.

AI.tldr: 研究了带分数阶应力张量扩散的2D无粘Oldroyd-B模型的均匀阻尼消失极限问题
AI.motivation: 研究2D无粘Oldroyd-B模型在分数阶应力张量扩散下的阻尼消失极限问题，探索分数阶扩散对模型正则性的影响以及时间衰减行为
AI.techniques: 改进的Fourier分裂方法、谱分析方法、时间可积性分析、临界正则性理论
AI.main_theorems: 1) 分数阶扩散降低全局正则性要求；2) a=0时的最优时间衰减率；3) a∈(0,1]时的均匀时间衰减率；4) 均匀阻尼消失速率；5) trτ的改进衰减率确保尖锐均匀阻尼消失速率
AI.significance: 为分数阶扩散的Oldroyd-B模型提供了系统的衰减分析框架，建立了阻尼消失极限的严格数学理论，对非牛顿流体力学和粘弹性流体研究有重要意义

title: Normalized solutions for a class of fractional Choquard equations with mixed nonlinearities
summary:
In this paper we study the following fractional Choquard equation with mixed nonlinearities:
  \[
  \left\{
  \begin{array}{l}
  (-Δ)^s u = λu + α\left( I_μ* |u|^q \right) |u|^{q-2} u + \left( I_μ* |u|^p \right) |u|^{p-2} u, \quad x \in \mathbb{R}^N, \\[4pt]
  \displaystyle \int_{\mathbb{R}^N} |u|^2 \,\mathrm{d}x = c^2 > 0.
  \end{array}
  \right.
  \]
  Here $N > 2s$, $s \in (0,1)$, $μ\in (0, N)$, and the exponents satisfy
  \[
  \frac{2N - μ}{N} < q < p < \frac{2N - μ}{N - 2s},
  \]
  while $α> 0$ is a sufficiently small parameter, $λ\in \mathbb{R}$ is the Lagrange multiplier associated with the mass constraint, and $I_μ$ denotes the Riesz potential. We establish existence and multiplicity results for normalized solutions and, in addition, prove the existence of ground state normalized solutions for $α$ in a suitable range.

AI.tldr: 研究带混合非线性项的分数阶Choquard方程在质量约束下的归一化解的存在性和多重性
AI.motivation: 研究分数阶Laplacian算子与Riesz势结合的Choquard方程在质量约束下的解，这类方程在量子物理中描述非局部相互作用，混合非线性项增加了问题的复杂性。
AI.techniques: 使用变分方法、山路引理、约束极小化技术、Pohozaev恒等式和紧性分析，处理分数阶算子和Riesz势的非局部特性。
AI.main_theorems: 证明了归一化解的存在性和多重性结果，并建立了在适当参数范围内基态归一化解的存在性。
AI.significance: 扩展了分数阶Choquard方程理论，为具有质量约束的非局部方程提供了新的存在性结果，对理解量子系统中的归一化波函数有重要意义。

title: Global existence and stability of near-affine solutions of compressible elastodynamics
summary: We prove that for sufficiently small $H^3$-perturbations of an affine solution, the Cauchy problem for the compressible nonlinear elastodynamics in $\mathbb{R}^d$, for $d=2,3$, admits a unique global strong solution. Moreover, we establish the asymptotic behavior of the solution.

AI.tldr: 证明了在二维和三维空间中，对仿射解进行充分小的H^3扰动时，可压缩非线性弹性动力学方程的柯西问题存在唯一全局强解并建立了解的渐近行为。
AI.motivation: 研究可压缩非线性弹性动力学方程的全局适定性问题，特别关注在仿射解附近的小扰动情况下解的长期存在性和渐近行为。
AI.techniques: 使用能量方法、小扰动分析、H^3空间框架，可能涉及双曲型偏微分方程的标准技术如能量估计、Sobolev不等式等。
AI.main_theorems: 对于d=2,3维空间，当初始数据是仿射解的充分小H^3扰动时，可压缩非线性弹性动力学方程的柯西问题存在唯一全局强解，并建立了解的渐近行为。
AI.significance: 为非线性弹性动力学方程的全局适定性提供了重要结果，扩展了小扰动理论在该领域的应用，对理解弹性材料的长期动力学行为有理论意义。

title: Liouville-type Theorems for Stable Solutions of the Hénon-Lane-Emden System
comment: 40 pages. To appear in J. London Math. Soc
summary: We investigate the Hénon-Lane-Emden system defined by $- Δu=|x|^a |v|^{p-1}v$ and $- Δv=|x|^b |u|^{q-1}u$ in $\mathbb{R}^N \!\setminus\! \{0\}$. We begin by establishing a general Liouville-type theorem for the subcritical case. Then we prove that the Hénon-Lane-Emden conjecture is valid for solutions stable outside a compact set, provided that $0 < \min\,\{p, q\} < 1$, or $0 \leq a - b \leq (N-2)(p - q)$, or $N \leq \frac{2(p+q+2)}{pq-1} + 10$. Additional Liouville-type theorems for the subcritical case are also obtained. Furthermore, we address the supercritical case. To our knowledge, these results constitute the first Liouville-type theorems for this class of solutions in the Hénon-Lane-Emden system. As a by-product, several existing results in the literature are refined.

AI.tldr: 建立了Hénon-Lane-Emden系统在$\mathbb{R}^N\setminus\{0\}$中的Liouville型定理，首次对稳定解在子临界和超临界情况下获得分类结果
AI.motivation: 研究Hénon-Lane-Emden系统在$\mathbb{R}^N\setminus\{0\}$中的非平凡解存在性问题，该系统是带权重非线性项的耦合椭圆方程组，在奇异点处具有Hénon型奇异性
AI.techniques: 使用Liouville型定理方法、稳定性分析、Pohozaev恒等式、能量估计、分类定理证明技术，结合参数范围的精细分析
AI.main_theorems: 1. 子临界情况的一般Liouville型定理；2. 当$0<\min\{p,q\}<1$或$0\leq a-b\leq(N-2)(p-q)$或$N\leq\frac{2(p+q+2)}{pq-1}+10$时，Hénon-Lane-Emden猜想对紧集外稳定解成立；3. 超临界情况的Liouville型定理
AI.significance: 首次为Hénon-Lane-Emden系统的稳定解建立了Liouville型定理，推广了经典Lane-Emden系统的结果，为带奇异权重的耦合椭圆系统分类理论提供了新工具

title: Constructing steering-type solutions for higher order Cauchy-Riemann equations in $\mathbb{R}^{m+1}$
summary: The multidimensional Cauchy-Riemann operator provides a framework for studying higher order partial differential equations in $\mathbb{R}^{m+1}$, whose solutions include polymonogenic and polyharmonic functions, among others. In this work, we aim to explicitly construct solutions to such systems, generated from families of complex valued functions which are closed under conjugation and under the action of the complex Cauchy-Riemann operator. Moreover, we prove that precisely some of these solutions also satisfy homogeneous linear differential equations involving the so-called hypercomplex derivative.

AI.tldr: 构建多维Cauchy-Riemann算子框架下高阶偏微分方程组的显式解，并研究其与超复数导数的关系
AI.motivation: 多维Cauchy-Riemann算子为研究ℝ^{m+1}中的高阶偏微分方程提供了框架，其解包括多单演函数和多调和函数等。本文旨在显式构造此类方程组的解，这些解由在复共轭和复Cauchy-Riemann算子作用下封闭的复值函数族生成。
AI.techniques: 使用多维Cauchy-Riemann算子框架，构造在复共轭和复Cauchy-Riemann算子作用下封闭的复值函数族，分析超复数导数相关的齐次线性微分方程
AI.main_theorems: 1. 显式构造了多维Cauchy-Riemann算子框架下高阶偏微分方程组的解；2. 证明了其中某些解也满足涉及超复数导数的齐次线性微分方程
AI.significance: 为高阶偏微分方程理论提供了新的显式解构造方法，深化了对多单演函数、多调和函数等特殊函数类的理解，建立了复分析、超复数分析与偏微分方程理论之间的联系

title: Regularity for fully nonlinear elliptic equations in generalized Orlicz spaces
summary: In this paper, we establish an optimal global Calderón-Zygmund type estimate for the viscosity solution to the Dirichlet boundary problem of fully nonlinear elliptic equations with possibly nonconvex nonlinearities. We prove that the Hessian of the solution is as integrable as the nonhomogeneous term in the setting of a given generalized Orlicz space even when the nonlinearity is asymptotically convex with respect to the Hessian of the solution.

AI.tldr: 建立了完全非线性椭圆方程Dirichlet边值问题在广义Orlicz空间中的最优全局Calderón-Zygmund型估计
AI.motivation: 研究具有可能非凸非线性项的完全非线性椭圆方程的Dirichlet边值问题，即使非线性项关于解的Hessian矩阵是渐近凸的，也要建立解的二阶导数在广义Orlicz空间中的最优可积性估计
AI.techniques: 使用粘度解理论、Calderón-Zygmund型估计、广义Orlicz空间理论、渐近凸性分析，以及完全非线性椭圆方程的精细正则性估计技术
AI.main_theorems: 证明了在广义Orlicz空间框架下，解的Hessian矩阵与非齐次项具有相同的可积性，即使非线性项是渐近凸的，这一估计是最优的全局Calderón-Zygmund型估计
AI.significance: 扩展了完全非线性椭圆方程的正则性理论，突破了传统凸性假设的限制，为处理更广泛的非线性问题提供了理论工具，在偏微分方程理论和变分法中具有重要意义

title: Existence and stability of discretely self-similar blowup for a wave maps type equation
summary: We study finite-time blowup for a nonlinear wave equation for maps from the Minkowski space $\mathbb{R}^{1+d}$ into the 1-sphere $\mathbb{S}^1$, whose nonlinearity exhibits a null-form structure. We construct, for every dimension $d \geq 1$, a countable family of discretely self-similar blowup solutions, which are even for $d=1$ and radial for $d \geq 2$. The main contribution of the paper is a detailed nonlinear stability analysis of this family of solutions. For $d \geq 2$, we consider radial data, while in $d=1$ we allow for general perturbations. After linearizing around the self-similar profiles in similarity variables, we construct resolvents of the resulting highly non-self-adjoint operators through Liouville-Green transformations and precise Volterra-type asymptotics. The construction itself, which occupies most of the paper, is technically challenging, as it is performed in arbitrary dimensions and for a countable family of operators in each. Combined with a detailed spectral analysis of the linearized operators, this yields sharp semigroup bounds and allows us to establish nonlinear stability of all discretely self-similar profiles in all dimensions, with precise co-dimension determined by the unstable spectrum. To our knowledge, this is the first result on the existence and stability of discretely self-similar blowup for a geometric wave equation.

AI.tldr: 构造了Minkowski空间到1-球面非线性波动方程的可数离散自相似爆破解族，并首次建立了这类几何波动方程离散自相似爆破解的非线性稳定性。
AI.motivation: 研究Minkowski空间到1-球面非线性波动方程的有限时间爆破现象，该方程具有零形式结构，旨在理解几何波动方程中离散自相似爆破解的存在性和稳定性。
AI.techniques: 使用相似变量将问题线性化，通过Liouville-Green变换和精确的Volterra型渐近分析构造高度非自伴算子的预解式，结合详细谱分析得到尖锐半群估计。
AI.main_theorems: 对任意维度d≥1构造了可数离散自相似爆破解族（d=1时为偶函数，d≥2时为径向函数），并建立了所有维度中所有离散自相似解的非线性稳定性，不稳定谱确定了精确余维数。
AI.significance: 首次证明了几何波动方程离散自相似爆破解的存在性和稳定性，为理解非线性波动方程爆破机制提供了新视角，技术方法可推广到其他几何波动方程。

title: The capillary Christoffel-Minkowski problem
comment: This paper was submitted to a journal for publication, and remains under peer review
summary: In this article, we introduce a $k$-th capillary area measure for capillary convex bodies in the Euclidean half-space, which serves as a boundary counterpart to the classical concept of area measure (see, e.g., \cite[Chapter 8]{Sch}). We then propose a Christoffel-Minkowski problem for capillary convex bodies, to find a capillary convex body in the Euclidean half-space with a prescribed $k$-th capillary area measure. This problem is equivalent to solving a Hessian-type equation with a Robin boundary value condition. We then establish the existence and uniqueness of a smooth solution under a natural sufficient condition.

AI.tldr: 引入欧氏半空间中毛细凸体的k阶毛细面积测度，并提出相应的Christoffel-Minkowski问题，建立了该问题光滑解的存在唯一性。
AI.motivation: 经典凸几何中的面积测度概念在边界条件下的推广，研究欧氏半空间中毛细凸体的几何测度理论，建立边界条件下的Christoffel-Minkowski问题。
AI.techniques: 毛细凸体理论、Hessian型偏微分方程、Robin边界条件、凸几何分析、面积测度理论。
AI.main_theorems: 建立了k阶毛细面积测度的定义，提出了毛细凸体的Christoffel-Minkowski问题，在自然充分条件下证明了光滑解的存在性和唯一性。
AI.significance: 将经典凸几何的Christoffel-Minkowski问题推广到边界条件情形，为毛细凸体理论提供了新的分析工具，连接了凸几何与偏微分方程理论。

title: Unconditional uniqueness of Hardy--Hénon parabolic equations on Herz spaces
summary: In this paper, we introduce the unconditional uniqueness of solutions in Herz spaces for the Hardy--Hénon parabolic equation, which is a semilinear heat equation with a power-type weight in the nonlinear term $|x|^γ|u|^{α-1}u$. It is expected that the power-type weight in the nonlinear term can be effectively handled within Herz spaces. In fact, our result in Herz spaces $\dot{K}^s_{q,r}({\mathbb R}^n)$ relaxes the endpoint case $q=α$ and the large interpolation exponent case $r\ge q$ compared to previous results.

AI.tldr: 在Herz空间中建立了Hardy-Hénon抛物方程解的无条件唯一性，放宽了先前结果中对端点情况q=α和大插值指数r≥q的限制。
AI.motivation: 研究Hardy-Hénon抛物方程（具有幂型权重的半线性热方程）在Herz空间中的解的唯一性问题。该方程的非线性项包含幂型权重|x|^γ|u|^{α-1}u，而Herz空间能有效处理这类权重。
AI.techniques: 使用Herz空间理论，特别是$\dot{K}^s_{q,r}(\mathbb{R}^n)$空间框架，处理非线性项中的幂型权重。通过空间分析方法，放宽了先前结果中对参数的限制条件。
AI.main_theorems: 在Herz空间中建立了Hardy-Hénon抛物方程解的无条件唯一性结果，相比先前结果放宽了两个关键限制：1) 端点情况q=α；2) 大插值指数情况r≥q。
AI.significance: 扩展了Hardy-Hénon方程解的唯一性理论，提供了更一般的函数空间框架，为处理具有幂型权重的非线性抛物方程开辟了新途径，具有重要的理论意义。

title: Stability under lamination and polycrystalline effective conductivity
summary: We prove the stability under lamination of a set of real, symmetric 3$\times$3 matrices that can be viewed as a subset of the effective conductivities of a polycrystal. Constructed in a companion paper, such set in combination with several previous constructions provides the best inner bound known so far on the $G$-closure of a three dimensional polycrystal.

AI.tldr: 证明了三维多晶体有效电导率集合在层合作用下的稳定性
AI.motivation: 研究三维多晶体复合材料的有效电导率集合（G-闭包）的刻画问题，这是复合材料理论中的核心问题，旨在确定所有可能通过微观结构设计实现的有效材料性质
AI.techniques: 使用层合稳定性分析方法，结合先前构造的集合，研究矩阵集合在层合操作下的封闭性
AI.main_theorems: 证明了某个实对称3×3矩阵集合在层合作用下的稳定性，该集合可视为多晶体有效电导率的子集
AI.significance: 为三维多晶体G-闭包提供了目前已知的最佳内界，推进了复合材料有效性质理论的发展，对材料设计和优化有重要意义

title: On Some Transformations Associated to a Certain Cone
summary: A model elliptic pseudo-differential equation in $4$-faced cone is studied in Sobolev--Slobodetskii space. The Bochner kernel for such a cone is evaluated and explicit formula for unique solution to the considered equation is presented under certain restrictions on the symbol. Boundary value problem with additional integral condition is considered and unique solvability to the boundary value problem is proved.

AI.tldr: 研究四维锥面上椭圆伪微分方程在Sobolev-Slobodetskii空间中的解，建立了Bochner核并给出了唯一解的显式公式。
AI.motivation: 研究四维锥面上的椭圆伪微分方程，这类问题在奇异几何和边界值问题中具有重要意义，特别是在处理具有复杂几何结构的偏微分方程时。
AI.techniques: 使用Sobolev-Slobodetskii空间理论、Bochner核方法、伪微分算子理论，以及处理带积分条件的边界值问题的技术。
AI.main_theorems: 1. 计算了四维锥面的Bochner核；2. 在符号满足特定限制条件下给出了唯一解的显式公式；3. 证明了带附加积分条件的边界值问题的唯一可解性。
AI.significance: 为奇异几何上的伪微分方程理论提供了新结果，扩展了边界值问题的处理方法，对椭圆型方程在非光滑区域上的研究有理论意义。
